summary: 列出指定对象类型的所有属性
description: 此命令用于列出与指定对象类型关联的所有属性。如果未指定任何对象类型，则此命令将列出所有支持的对象类型以及这些对象类型关联的所有属性。
usage: list_property [-help] [-type {cell clock design lib lib_cell lib_pin lib_timing_arc net path_group pin port timing_arc timing_path timing_point pg_net pg_pin lib_pg_pin si_victim si_attacker}]

options.name: -type
options.description: 指定要列出属性的对象类型。支持的对象类型包括：cell, clock, design, lib, lib_cell, lib_pg_pin, lib_pin, lib_timing_arc, net, path_group, pg_net, pg_pin, pin, port, si_attacker, si_victim, timing_arc, timing_path, timing_point。
